title: [V1][Structured Output] Support xgrammar-free in async LLM
fix: validate backend block size earlier
body: Fixes #42510. Validate user-specified block sizes against selected attention backend before KV cache setup.

title: [MoE] Migrate W4A8 CT to oracle kernel setup
body: Migrate W4A8 CT to oracle kernel setup.

title: fix: guard flash-attn rotary import
body: Fixes #42675. Probe flash_attn.ops.triton.rotary before importing apply_rotary.

title: [Bugfix][Core] avoid zmq port conflicts with multiple api servers
body: Fix zmq port conflicts in large DP deployments. Adds test to confirm get_open_ports_list does not assign conflicting ports.

title: [CI] Add MTP + PD disagg test for Qwen3.5
body: Followup to #41869. Add MTP + PD disaggregation test for Qwen3.5 with NIXL Connector.

title: [Model Runner V2] Fix kv_connector pre_forward order
body: Fix kv_connector pre_forward order in Model Runner V2. Part of #41286.

title: [Core] Per-layer parallelism policy + TPA-GQA on FlashAttention
body: Implements per-layer parallelism policy with TPA-GQA on FlashAttention. Decouples attention head parallelism from FFN tensor parallelism.

title: [Model Runner v2] Support reload weights (sleep mode)
body: Support reload weights (sleep mode) in Model Runner V2. Part of #41286.
